MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY BRADLEY, CLAUDETTE AS TO DEFENDANT LARSEN, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARSEN, STEVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRADLEY, CLAUDETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSEN, STEVE $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $305.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LARSEN, STEVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BRADLEY, CLAUDETTE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
